variants.title: SKUs
variants.subtitle: Stock keeping units — actual inventory unit
variants.pricingDomainSubtitle: Separate regular price, promotion, markdown, cost, inventory valuation, and margin for future expansion.
variants.regularPriceDesc: Base list price of the SKU, including output VAT and before/after VAT values.
variants.promotionPriceDesc: Promotional price by campaign or effective date range.
variants.markdownDesc: Price reductions for clearance, aging stock, or lifecycle adjustments.
variants.currentCostDesc: Current SKU cost used as the operational cache for valuation and margin.
variants.inventoryValuationDesc: Valuation snapshots are updated automatically from stock movements and current cost.
variants.inventoryValuationHint: Valuation snapshots will appear once the SKU has real on-hand stock.
variants.marginSnapshotDesc: Estimated gross margin from price before VAT and current cost.
variants.marginSnapshotHint: Enter current cost and price before VAT to preview margin snapshot.
variants.createSkuFirst: Create the SKU first before managing price history.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.subtitle: Stores, DCs and warehouse hierarchy
warehouses.name: Name
warehouses.addressRequiredHint: Required for distribution centers and stores.

documents.subtitle: Stock in, out, transfer, count and adjustment documents
documents.editDraftOnly: Only draft documents can be edited
documents.sameWarehouseError: Source and destination warehouse cannot be the same
documents.skuNoUnitBarcode: This SKU does not track barcodes.
documents.approveConfirm: Approve this document? Stock will be updated.

stocks.title: Current Stock
stocks.subtitle: On-hand and available quantity by SKU and warehouse

purchaseOrders.title: Purchase Orders
purchaseOrders.subtitle: Order and receive goods from suppliers

goodsReceipts.title: Goods Receipts
goodsReceipts.prefillFromPoHint: Prefilled with remaining qty and PO barcodes when available. Edit or scan actual units on receipt.
goodsReceipts.approveConfirm: Approve this receipt? Stock will be updated.
goodsReceipts.approvePermissionHint: You cannot approve this receipt. Ask a team leader or administrator.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Rule-based inventory signals that can later feed an AI copilot

filters.title: Filters
filters.deadStockDaysHint: SKUs with no outbound for this many days are treated as dead stock.
filters.lookbackDaysHint: Used for sales velocity and transfer suggestions.

tabHints.deadStock: On-hand SKUs with no sales — tied capital and obsolescence risk
tabHints.velocity: Low cover or zero demand — replenish or review
tabHints.transfer: Rebalance surplus warehouses and demand-heavy locations

copilot.explainSubtitle: Rule-based analysis from snapshots — ready for AI copilot
copilot.futureAiNote: AI copilot will add richer explanations and contextual chat.
copilot.summaryDeadStock: Found {count} dead-stock SKUs tying up ~{capital} capital; {critical} need urgent action.
copilot.summaryDeadStockEmpty: No dead stock for the current filters — inventory is moving well.
copilot.summaryVelocity: {alerts} SKUs need attention for cover or demand in the lookback window.
copilot.summaryVelocityEmpty: Sales velocity looks stable — no low-cover alerts.
copilot.summaryTransfer: {count} transfer suggestions can rebalance stock across warehouses.
copilot.summaryTransferEmpty: No transfer suggestions match the current filters.
copilot.explainIntro: The system rated {location} at priority P{priority}.

rationale.deadCritical: Long idle stock ties up capital — prioritize clearance or outlet transfer.
rationale.deadMarkdown: Slow mover — consider markdown or relocation to an outlet channel.
rationale.deadReview: Monitor further or consider stopping replenishment.
rationale.velocityUrgent: Low cover vs recent sales — stock-out risk without timely replenishment.
rationale.velocityPlan: Plan replenishment or transfer within the next few days.
rationale.velocityNoDemand: No outbound in the period — review dead stock or discontinuation.
rationale.velocityMonitor: Stable demand — continue monitoring, no urgent action needed.
rationale.transfer: Balance surplus and low-cover warehouses — reduce dead stock at source.

deadStock.title: Dead stock
deadStock.subtitle: SKUs with on-hand stock but no outbound for the configured period

salesVelocity.title: Sales velocity
salesVelocity.subtitle: Recent outbound demand and estimated stock cover by warehouse

transfer.title: Transfer suggestions
transfer.subtitle: Suggested rebalancing from surplus warehouses to demand-heavy warehouses

blocked.no_internal_source: No surplus warehouse in same brand

actions.dead_stock_critical_markdown: Prioritize markdown clearance at {warehouseCode} — SKU {sku} idle for {days} days.
actions.dead_stock_markdown_or_transfer: Consider markdown or move to outlet — {sku} at {warehouseCode} ({days} days without sales).
actions.dead_stock_review: Monitor and consider stopping replenishment — {sku} at {warehouseCode}.
actions.velocity_replenish_urgent: Urgent replenishment: create PO or transfer — {sku} at {warehouseCode} has ~{coverDays} days cover.
actions.velocity_replenish_plan: Plan replenishment or transfer — {sku} at {warehouseCode} (~{coverDays} days cover).
actions.velocity_no_demand_review: No recent outbound — review dead stock or stop ordering {sku} at {warehouseCode}.

validation.noSkuAvailable: No SKU exists yet. Create SKUs before continuing.
validation.documentNeedsLine: The document must contain at least one line.
validation.lineQuantityPositive: Line {line}: quantity must be greater than zero.
validation.lineAdjustmentNonZero: Line {line}: adjustment quantity cannot be zero.
validation.lineCountedNonNegative: Line {line}: counted quantity cannot be negative.
validation.transferSameWarehouse: Source and destination warehouses must be different.
validation.goodsReceiptQuantityRequired: Enter a received quantity for at least one line.
validation.lineBarcodeWholeQuantity: Line {line}: barcode-managed SKUs require whole-number quantities.

apiErrors.requestFailed: Could not reach the API. Check that the backend is running.
apiErrors.productVariantNotFound: SKU was not found or was not selected.
apiErrors.warehouseNotFound: Warehouse was not found or was not selected.
apiErrors.insufficientStock: Insufficient available stock for this action.
apiErrors.lineQuantityPositive: Line quantity must be greater than zero.
apiErrors.documentNeedsLine: The document must contain at least one line.
apiErrors.transferSameWarehouse: Source and destination warehouses cannot be the same.
apiErrors.onlyDraftEditable: Only draft documents can be updated.
apiErrors.onlyDraftCancellable: Only draft documents can be cancelled.
apiErrors.reservationReferenceRequired: Either cart session or order reference is required.
apiErrors.warehouseAddressLineRequired: Street address is required for DC and store warehouses.
apiErrors.warehouseWardRequired: Ward is required for DC and store warehouses.
apiErrors.warehouseDistrictRequired: District is required for DC and store warehouses.
apiErrors.warehouseProvinceRequired: Province/City is required for DC and store warehouses.
apiErrors.cannotApproveDocument: You are not allowed to approve this document. Approve permission or team-leader role is required.
apiErrors.cannotApproveGoodsReceipt: You are not allowed to approve this goods receipt.
apiErrors.cannotManageDocument: You can only manage your own documents or team members' documents as team leader.
apiErrors.cannotReceiveTransfer: You are not allowed to receive this transfer.
apiErrors.highValueSubmitRequired: This document exceeds the value threshold — submit it for approval before final approval.
